title: Danger Warning Signs
subtitle: Class A
description: Danger warning signs alert drivers to potential hazards ahead. They are triangular with a red border and white/yellow background.

signs.name: Danger Warning Sign
signs.meaning: Insignia of danger warning sign

signs.name: T-Junction
signs.meaning: Road ends ahead; you must turn left or right.

signs.name: Road junction ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of road junction ahead

signs.name: Curve ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of curve ahead

signs.name: Sharp Curve ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of sharp curve ahead

signs.name: double Curve ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of double curve ahead

signs.name: keep well to the left of the road
signs.meaning: Warning to emphasize that traffic must keep well to the left of the road

signs.name: Rock falls ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of possible rock falls ahead

signs.name: Road narrows to the right ahead
signs.meaning: Warning that road narrows to the right ahead

signs.name: Road narrows centrally ahead
signs.meaning: Warning that road narrows centrally ahead

signs.name: road narrows to the left ahead
signs.meaning: Warning that road narrows to the left ahead.

signs.name: Two way traffic ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of two way traffic ahead

signs.name: Narrow bridge ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of narrow bridge ahead

signs.name: Narrow grid ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of narrow grid ahead

signs.name: Grid ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of grid ahead.

signs.name: side road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of side road ahead

signs.name: Cross Road Ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of cross road ahead

signs.name: steep descent ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of steep descent ahead.

signs.name: steep ascent ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of steep ascent ahead.

signs.name: Dip in road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of a dip in the road ahead.

signs.name: Hump in road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of a hump in the road ahead.

signs.name: look out for children on the road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning to look out for children on the road ahead

signs.name: look out for pedestrians on the road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning to look out for pedestrians on the road ahead.

signs.name: pedestrian crossing ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of pedestrian crossing ahead.

signs.name: Vehicles having greater width than the figure shown won't be able to pass
signs.meaning: Warning of obstacle ahead having (a) narrow (b) low clearance. Vehicles having greater width than the figure shown won't be able to pass

signs.name: Vehicles having greater height than the figure shown won't be able to pass
signs.meaning: Warning of obstacle ahead having (a) narrow (b) low clearance. Vehicles having greater height than the figure shown won't be able to pass

signs.name: look out for animals on road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning to look out for animals on road ahead.

signs.name: Animal crossing ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of animal crossing ahead.

signs.name: look out for elephants or other wild animals on road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning to look out for elephants or other wild animals on road ahead

signs.name: antelopes or other wild animals on road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning to look out for antelopes or other wild animals on road ahead.

signs.name: slippery road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of slippery road ahead.

signs.name: gravel road ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of gravel road ahead.

signs.name: traffic must slow down to follow a detour
signs.meaning: Warning that traffic must slow down to follow a detour

signs.name: slow down and expect to be stopped
signs.meaning: Warning to slow down and expect to be stopped

signs.name: slow down because of road workers ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of road workers ahead.

signs.name: rail/road level crossing ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of rail/road level crossing ahead

signs.name: physical barrier ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of physical barrier ahead

signs.name: stop or give way sign ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of stop or give way sign ahead

signs.name: robot ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of robot ahead

signs.name: roundabout ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of roundabout ahead

title: Regulatory Signs
subtitle: Class B
description: Regulatory signs indicate actions that are forbidden, compulsory, or reserved. They include prohibitory signs (circular, red border, white background), command signs (circular, blue background), and reservation signs (circular, blue background for reserved lanes).

signs.name: Passage prohibited for all vehicular traffic in direction of arrow
signs.meaning: Vehicles must not proceed in the direction indicated by the arrow.

signs.name: Direction to be followed as indicated by the direction of the arrow
signs.meaning: Vehicles must follow the direction shown by the arrow.

signs.name: About turn prohibited
signs.meaning: Vehicles are not allowed to make a U-turn.

signs.name: Turning to the left prohibited
signs.meaning: Vehicles are not allowed to turn left at this point.

signs.name: Turning to the right prohibited
signs.meaning: Vehicles are not allowed to turn right at this point.

signs.name: Railroad level crossing
signs.meaning: Warning of a railway crossing ahead.

signs.name: Special sign in conjunction with robot to indicate turning to the right prohibited
signs.meaning: Indicates no right turn when used with a traffic signal.

signs.name: Parking prohibited in direction of arrow
signs.meaning: Parking is not allowed in the direction shown by the arrow.

signs.name: Parking restricted to period shown in direction of arrow
signs.meaning: Parking allowed only during times shown and in the direction of the arrow.

signs.name: Parking restricted to period shown
signs.meaning: Parking is allowed only during the times displayed on the sign.

signs.name: Parking restricted to class of vehicle indicated only
signs.meaning: Parking allowed only for specified vehicle types such as taxis or buses.

signs.name: Stopping prohibited in direction indicated by arrow
signs.meaning: Stopping is not allowed in the direction indicated by the arrow.

signs.name: Cyclists prohibited
signs.meaning: Bicycles are not allowed beyond this point.

signs.name: Stop at customs control point
signs.meaning: Vehicles must stop for customs inspection.

signs.name: Overtaking prohibited for the distance indicated
signs.meaning: No overtaking allowed for the distance specified on the sign.

signs.name: Stopping, waiting and parking prohibited during period shown
signs.meaning: Stopping, waiting, and parking are prohibited during the times shown.

signs.name: Parking prohibited for all vehicles other than those for which special provision exists
signs.meaning: Parking is prohibited except for vehicles with special authorization.

signs.name: Speed limit sign - same as general limit
signs.meaning: Indicates the speed limit is the same as the general area limit.

signs.name: Speed limit sign - different from general limit
signs.meaning: Indicates a different speed limit from the general area limit.

signs.name: Speed limit - maximum in km/h
signs.meaning: Maximum speed allowed in kilometers per hour.

signs.name: Gross mass of single vehicle exceeded prohibited
signs.meaning: Vehicles exceeding the specified gross mass are not allowed.

signs.name: Vehicles exceeding width prohibited
signs.meaning: Vehicles with loads wider than specified are prohibited.

signs.name: Vehicles exceeding height prohibited
signs.meaning: Vehicles with loads taller than specified are prohibited.

signs.name: No entry for vehicular traffic
signs.meaning: Do not enter this road or lane.

signs.name: Give precedence to all approaching traffic
signs.meaning: Vehicles must yield to all traffic on the main road.

signs.name: Parking prohibited unless loading or offloading
signs.meaning: Parking only allowed for loading or unloading goods.

signs.name: Stopping prohibited except bus stopping for passengers
signs.meaning: Stopping is prohibited except for buses picking up or dropping off passengers.

signs.name: Stop line compliance
signs.meaning: Vehicles must stop behind the line; if none exists, stop without encroaching on other traffic.

signs.name: Vehicles give precedence to cross traffic
signs.meaning: Vehicles must yield to cross traffic before proceeding.

signs.name: Cyclists stop and give precedence
signs.meaning: Cyclists must stop and yield to all traffic before entering the road ahead.

signs.name: Cyclists give precedence to cross traffic
signs.meaning: Cyclists must yield to cross traffic before proceeding.

signs.name: Temporary traffic control - restriction
signs.meaning: Sign used to temporarily control traffic where movement restrictions are necessary.

signs.name: Temporary traffic control - restriction
signs.meaning: Sign used to temporarily control traffic where movement restrictions are necessary.

title: Informative Signs
subtitle: Class C
description: Informative signs provide directions, distances, facility locations, and tourism information. They include guidance signs (rectangular, green or blue background) and tourism signs (rectangular, brown background with white text).

signs.name: Advance direction signs
signs.meaning: Indicates the directions vehicles should take ahead.

signs.name: Advance information signs
signs.meaning: Provides advance information about the road or traffic conditions.

signs.name: Place name
signs.meaning: Shows the name of a town, city, or locality.

signs.name: Distance sign
signs.meaning: Indicates the distance to a destination.

signs.name: Direction sign - temporary road detour
signs.meaning: Shows the direction of a temporary road detour.

signs.name: Police control ahead
signs.meaning: Warning of police control; traffic should slow down and expect to stop. Erected by police only.

signs.name: Dual carriageway ahead
signs.meaning: Informative sign indicating the start of a dual carriageway.

signs.name: Direction sign
signs.meaning: Indicates the direction to a specific location.

signs.name: Direction sign to a hospital
signs.meaning: Shows the direction to a hospital.

signs.name: Directions sign to first-aid facilities
signs.meaning: Indicates the direction to first-aid facilities.

signs.name: De-restriction sign
signs.meaning: Indicates the end of a specially imposed speed limit.

signs.name: Cycle track sign
signs.meaning: Indicates the existence of a cycle track.

signs.name: No through road
signs.meaning: Indicates a dead-end street with no through traffic.

signs.name: Taxi rank sign
signs.meaning: Indicates the location of a taxi rank.

signs.name: Bus stop sign
signs.meaning: Indicates the location of a bus stop.

signs.name: Parking area sign
signs.meaning: Indicates the existence of a parking area.

signs.name: Direction sign to a parking area
signs.meaning: Shows the direction to a parking area.

signs.name: Lay-by ahead
signs.meaning: Indicates a lay-by ahead for stopping or resting.

signs.name: Rest place ahead
signs.meaning: Indicates the location of a rest area ahead.

signs.name: One way road direction
signs.meaning: Indicates the direction of travel on a one-way road.

title: Traffic Light Signals
subtitle: Class D
description: Traffic light signals control the movement of vehicles and pedestrians at intersections. The correct sequence is Green, Amber, Red, then Amber+Red, Green.

signs.name: Stop
signs.meaning: Vehicles must come to a complete stop.

signs.name: Warning of stop
signs.meaning: Warning to drivers that a stop sign is ahead.

signs.name: Proceed with caution
signs.meaning: Drivers should proceed carefully.

signs.name: Traffic turning to the right may proceed if the road is clear
signs.meaning: Vehicles turning right may go when safe.

signs.name: Rail/road level crossing with flashing warning lights
signs.meaning: Indicates a level crossing with active flashing lights.

signs.name: Example of flashing light signal
signs.meaning: Sign demonstrating a flashing light signal for traffic control.

signs.name: Only straight ahead traffic may proceed
signs.meaning: Vehicles are only allowed to move straight ahead.

signs.name: Traffic turning to the left may proceed if the road is clear
signs.meaning: Vehicles turning left may go when safe.

signs.name: Proceed with caution (green arrow)
signs.meaning: Traffic may proceed as other directions have been stopped; indicated by green arrow.

signs.name: Proceed with caution and give way to traffic from right
signs.meaning: Proceed carefully and yield to vehicles coming from the right.

title: Carriageway Markings
subtitle: Class E
description: Carriageway markings are painted on the road surface to guide, warn, and regulate traffic flow.

signs.name: Vehicle X & Y keep left (A-B / B-A)
signs.meaning: Vehicle X must keep to the left of the continuous line between points A and B; Vehicle Y must keep to the left between points B and A.

signs.name: Vehicle X & Y keep left (A-D / B-C), may cross after D/C
signs.meaning: Vehicle X must keep left between A and D but may cross after D if safe; Vehicle Y keeps left between B and C but may cross after C if safe.

signs.name: Double prohibition line
signs.meaning: No vehicle may at any time be driven on the right-hand side of this lane.

signs.name: Pedestrian crossing stripes
signs.meaning: Pedestrian crossing pattern at points other than road intersections; alternate black and white stripes.

signs.name: Direction arrows with prohibition lines
signs.meaning: Arrows used with prohibition lines have a regulatory effect.

signs.name: Edge of carriageway line
signs.meaning: No motor vehicle shall cross or straddle the yellow line except to overtake traffic turning right.
